fields.purpose: Preserve project context without copying unrelated conversation.
current: Exporters and importers have conformance snapshots.
Package smoke checks run in the release gate.
fields.ai_task: Continue implementation from the next unchecked release item.
fields.ai_boundary: Do not reveal private roadmap names or unrelated products.
risk: A handoff may become stale if release checks are not rerun.
verify: Run ontosfmt pack examples/ai-handoff.ontos --node handoff-root --for handoff.
Validate references before using the handoff.

fields.purpose: Pick the highest-risk unchecked release gate.
verify: Compare docs/TASKS.md with current package scripts.
